Event Title: Get MAUL'd: Forged In Fetish - A Gear Social @ MAL
Location/Venue: Hyatt Regency Washington on Capitol Hill
Venue Address:
400 New Jersey Avenue Northwest
Washington D.C., DC 20001
Description: Join us Saturday evening for our annual "in gear" cocktail social in the Congressional B room (directly off the Hyatt lobby), featuring a cash bar (no waiting!) and entertainment by DJ Tony Ruiz. This event is open to all attendees of MAL 2026.
Starts at 8 PM. In conjunction with the Three Rivers Leather Club of Pittsburgh, PA, the Officers of MAUL will be hosting a "Jail n Bail" event at P Town bar in Pittsburgh.
Join us as we celebrate twenty years of legacy, pride, and community.
